milestone: M2 续 — 完整会话状态机与分支对话（第一版方案第 10/11/13 章）

design.stage_storage: derived from persisted message + job history (no DB schema change)
design.branch_replies: hybrid — fixed Bridge copy for guidance/guardrail/error, agent-generated coaching for feedback_given/follow_up with the real analysis summary injected

notes_on_redaction: No account/password/cookie/token/URL/model key recorded. Assistant reply text not stored verbatim; only pass/fail + bounded structural facts.

deploy.method: LF-normalized upload to current release src + py_compile + root_rebuild_bridge_fast.sh

local_tests: 301 tests; only the pre-existing unrelated failure test_identity_diagnostics_fails_closed_for_multiple_current_workspaces remains; the prior _intent schema-contract regression is fixed.

conversation_e2e_checks.collecting_intent_fixed_reply: 我想做短视频 -> fixed guidance (赛道/目标用户/变现) — agent not called
conversation_e2e_checks.waiting_for_video_fixed_reply: 帮我分析一个视频 (no link) -> fixed guidance to send douyin link or upload
conversation_e2e_checks.follow_up_grounded_in_analysis: 开头怎么改 -> 971-char coaching reply that referenced the actual analyzed video content (the real analysis summary was injected into the agent prompt by the Bridge)
conversation_e2e_checks.note_failed: douyin /note/ 图文 link -> job failed
conversation_e2e_checks.error_recovery_reply: post-failure text -> fixed error copy ('不会假装已经看过视频', guidance to resend a valid single-video link)

key_validation: Follow-up coaching is grounded in the real worker/Doubao analysis (which is NOT in the Gateway agent memory) because the Bridge injects the analysis summary into the branch prompt — verified live by the reply naming actual lines from the analyzed video.
